## Earnie 2.1.0-alpha.1

First **community pre-release** after 2.0.0. For forum / early testers — not `:latest`.

Pin the image:

```text
ghcr.io/jochentcc/earnie-energy:2.1.0-alpha.1
```

Compose stacks that use `:latest` stay on the last official **2.0.0**.

### Highlights

- **Multi-PV scenarios** — several PV systems per scenario; summed forecast/climate; per-PV traces on weekly SE charts
- **Compact editors** — label|field layout in SE, Hauskonfigurator, Live entity pickers; unique Bezeichnung on save
- **SE** — stable progress/result order; results disclaimer; geo always from house profile (no Standort override)
- **Tariff pickers** — Land + Typ filters (Szenarieneditor + Live-Konfiguration)
- **Debug dump schema v3** — single `debug` ZIP type; Cockpit dialog with Titel/Symptom; download + dialog close fix
- **Hauskonfigurator** — PV switch no longer jumps back to Hausprofil
- **Synology compose** — UI Streamlit bound to `0.0.0.0:8501` so the published port is reachable

### Docker images

- `ghcr.io/jochentcc/earnie-energy:2.1.0-alpha.1`
- Legacy alias: `ghcr.io/jochentcc/ernie-energy:2.1.0-alpha.1`
- **No** `:latest` for this tag

Multi-arch: `linux/amd64` (Synology / Proxmox) · `linux/arm64` (LoxBerry).

### Known issues

- **EV FertigUm (config path)** — fix implemented; live verification still pending
- **Weekend ready-by 12:00** — open check for Start/End-SOC constraints

See [backlog/Backlog-Bugfixes.md](https://github.com/JochenTCC/Earnie/blob/main/backlog/Backlog-Bugfixes.md).
